records.hours: Please call for more information
records.raw_text: Living Faith Lutheran Church | Address: 1605 Veirs Mill Road, Rockville, 20851 | Phone: (301) 424-8622 | Website: https://mylivingfaith.org | Hours: Please call for more information | Type: Pre-Packed Pantry Items | Accessibility: Walk-in | Languages: Cantonese, Chinese, Spanish | Features: Special Diet Accommodations, Fresh Produce, Other Services Offered | Walk ins on a first come first served basis. They offer pre-packed grocery bags, a number of free choice items and a swap option for clients between themselves. Our offerings include shelf stable items, culturally relevant foods, fresh produce and some frozen items.
